candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related amortization row in the operating section, but it appears to be a component within the selected COGS parent bucket ('Cost of Operating Revenue' / 'Cost of Revenues - Total'), alongside other cost-of-revenue components such as unclassified and other cost rows. Adding it separately would risk double counting.

Explicit COGS-related depreciation row in the operating section, but it appears to be a component of the selected COGS total rather than a separate same-level expense outside the selected bucket. Therefore it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected COGS rows are parent/total cost-of-revenue buckets. The visible D&A rows for cost of revenues appear as sub-components under that bucket, so D&A is treated as already embedded for purposes of the selected COGS final_choice.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related depreciation row in the operating section, but it appears to be a component of the selected SG&A bucket rather than a separate expense outside it. Adding it separately would likely double count against the selected SG&A parent row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related amortization row in the operating section, but it appears to sit as a component within the selected SG&A bucket. No separate R&D row is selected in XRD, and there is no distinct 'Amortization in R&D' line here; this visible amortization line should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Relative to the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket, the SG&A D&A rows appear to be embedded component lines under the SG&A parent rather than separate same-level expenses. No separate above-operating-profit R&D row is present, and no R&D-specific D&A row is shown.
